name: For Sweet Spuds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the butter and brown sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually add the flour and flaked coconut to the mixture, stirring until evenly distributed.
3. If desired, sprinkle marshmallows over the top of the mixture.
4. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
5. Bake in the oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
